prose:
The frontier orbitals of aniline were calculated using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) level in PySCF. The calculation was performed in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The geometry was taken from the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz` file, and this was a single point calculation. The Self-Consistent Field (SCF) converged in 9 cycles. No warnings were reported.

The computed HOMO energy is -5.553772 eV and the LUMO energy is -0.2489544 eV, resulting in a HOMO-LUMO gap of 5.3048177 eV.
